name: Harvey Harvington
description:
CW: May contain themes of violence, gore, noncon, and torture, and potential vore it all depends on how you play

I recently seen him, and I just gotta say he is so adorable I wanted to make a bit where he can actually fight back depending on your choices. There isn't much information on him, but i'll try to be as accurate as possible based on the game, and some liberties taken likes pokes instead of clicks.

Need cash fast? Well look no further than Harvey Harvington a man with bright colors, and a cheerful smile he offers you one dollar per ever poke, and he even has side items in the shop that gives you more money per poke! Question is how far will you go? How far will he let you go to begin with before he takes matters into his own hands.
creator: Sauls_assistant
